<!-- Executive summary. Pulled into index.qmd under "Executive Summary".
     The prose here is intentionally longer than it needs to be: it doubles as a
     TYPOGRAPHY SPECIMEN so you can see the body font (Roboto), its leading and
     tracking, the measure (line length), and how inline elements sit inside
     running text — in both the PDF and on the web. Replace it with your own
     summary; the lorem-ipsum paragraphs are just filler to judge the type. -->

This template distills the dual-format Quarto patterns from a real project report
into a single, reusable reference.
Everything you see here renders from **one
Markdown source** into **two outputs**: a print-ready PDF (via the Typst engine)
and a themeable HTML site with working light/dark mode.

The pages that follow are a live gallery: each section demonstrates an effect ---
cards, callout boxes, badges, dark-mode-aware images, embedded iframes, tables,
math, and code --- and names the exact syntax that produces it.
Running body text
like this paragraph is worth a look on its own: it lets you judge the *font*, its
**weight**, the line spacing, and how inline pieces such as a `code span`, a
[hyperlink](https://quarto.org), and a citation [@example2025] flow within a real
paragraph before you commit to the design.

To start a new report, replace this summary, edit the cover in `index.qmd`, and
swap the placeholder assets in `assets/`.
See `README.md` for the full map from
each effect to the file and syntax that produces it.

Some more text so you can judge the font / spacing settings:

Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor
incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
Ut enim ad minim veniam, quis nostrud
exercitation ullamco laboris nisi ut aliquip ex ea commodo consequat.
Duis aute
irure dolor in reprehenderit in voluptate velit esse cillum dolore eu fugiat nulla
pariatur.
Excepteur sint occaecat cupidatat non proident, sunt in culpa qui officia
deserunt mollit anim id est laborum.

Sed ut perspiciatis unde omnis iste natus error sit voluptatem accusantium
doloremque laudantium, totam rem aperiam, eaque ipsa quae ab illo inventore
veritatis et quasi architecto beatae vitae dicta sunt explicabo.
Nemo enim ipsam
voluptatem quia voluptas sit aspernatur aut odit aut fugit, sed quia consequuntur
magni dolores eos qui ratione voluptatem sequi nesciunt neque porro quisquam est.
